I have already deployed defensive magic circles across the Sky Realm. Izumo?
Yes, ma'am?
I will head out and destroy the source of this formless corruption. The defense of the castle, I entrust to you.
Understood, ma'am.
Azuma, Kitakaze, you are to lead our forces across the Five Provinces and Seven Districts and eliminate the enemy.
- As you wish.  - Roger!
Ikazuchi, Inazuma, summon Shimanto and Daisen hither. Inform them that war has come to Amahara.
Understood, ma'am.
We'll see to it.
Ibuki, head to the Amahara Cloudsea and crush the enemy, then accompany the aforementioned two to Ama no Tobira to maintain it.
As you've bidden, so shall it be done!
Lastly, I-404.
Unzen's group is bringing the Commander to Amahara Castle. In the name of utmost safety, take your forces and rendezvous with them.
Copy that! Don't worry, Musashi – I'll bring the Commander back safely if it's the last thing I do!
As long as each of you carries out your duty, our victory is assured.
Yes, ma'am!

The Web of a Bygone Day.say: ...The importance of cognitive defense was realized in the wake of the Spectral Moon incident.
The Sky Realm of Amahara, as a project, was devised for that very purpose.
I didn't expect it to end like it did...
A group was having a casual conversation within a garden surrounded by stars.
That was until their chat was disrupted by a flashing, red word appearing in the air – WARNING.
Why are there alarms going off even here? Did something happen?
Yeah.
Helena's gone into battle. Something's gone seriously wrong in the Sky Realm.
Helena, has the Commander gotten into trouble?! That warning in the sky sure suggests it!
Perfect timing, Memphis. Tell Vestal and Arizona to get ready for dispatch.
What? I mean, okay!
Are you sure we shouldn't depart immediately?
It's fine. The situation isn't that bad.
Still, I'm preparing for it to get worse. There's too much new stuff today, and I don't like it.
I understand. A lot of first-time things for you today.
While I haven't seen these "Dream Stones" before, this series of events today does invoke a sense of déjà vu in me.
I have no evidence for this, but I feel like Amahara went into a different direction as soon as the stones appeared.
What do you mean by "a different direction"?
Perhaps it's more apt to say that it has gone off-course.
What is clear is that someone unrelated has become involved in Amahara's growth.
Moreover, this person... surely knows about what happened in the past.
I see...
Keep monitoring, Jintsuu. Let me know if you discover anything.
I'm gonna go make some adjustments to Rodney.
I will get to the bottom of who's plotting in the shadows here.

Phase Shift.say: Thanks to I-404's group covering us, we managed to cover a lot of ground in a short time.
With Unzen constantly looking for shortcuts amidst the chaos, we finally broke through the dark tide and made it to the heart of the Sky Realm – Amahara Castle.
However, the safety we expected to find wasn't there.
The castle has been breached despite the many magic circles around it, with many of its buildings having been stained and turned black.
They've breached Amahara Castle's perimeter!
How is that possible?! The foes we fought en route weren't especially mighty, so they shouldn't have been able to penetrate the defenses regardless of how numerous they were!
Amahara has fallen... What a horrific sight...
KABOOOM!
There you are, Unzen. Come this way.
Izumo, what in the world is happening?
Somehow, the enemy slipped past the barrier and made it inside the castle. They caught us off guard.
Pardon? They even slipped past the castle's barrier?
Yeah... So we fortified our defenses, and concentrated our forces and magic circles around the third main palace, where the Venerable Three are.
It's been this long, and the Venerable Three still have yet to resolve the situation?
The situation's not so straightforward.
They've already erased the source of the corruption twice, but both times, another source sprang up.
It's suspected the problem lies in the Depths.
The Depths... Is there such a place within the Sky Realm?
The Dream Stones. They're collected from the Depths, no?
The Dream Stones...
(Sounds like the Sakurans are in a bit of a stalemate.)
(I knew the formless corruption's appearance was only the beginning. Of course things wouldn't be so simple...)
(Helena, have you figured out the cause yet?)
(Still working on it. There are so many things I can't explain with this attack.)
(They're right about one thing, though – that the source is in the Depths.)
(Don't be alarmed. A rescue team is standing by. If things get completely out of control, we'll jump in and pull at least you and Helena out of there.)
(Try to save them, too, if you can.)
(We'll try.)
Sometime later, Izumo escorts me and the other Sakurans to a part of the castle that was still intact.
Although the black tide bangs on the barrier outside, this is as far as they can get.
So, I relax a bit and decide to restore my strength for the battle of attrition that's sure to come.
I gaze at the cloud that hangs at the castle's peak like the sun.
As my mind wanders, it feels like I'm looking at an even bigger space.
In a black void, a woman in colorful clothing stares at several picture scrolls unfolded before her eyes.
The one end of the scrolls hovers beside her hand, while the other stretches on endlessly into the distance.
I've found it...
That is where the calamity's source lies...
Her eyes fixate on one of the scrolls – and so do the countless other gazes amidst the nothingness.
Phase shift...
The scroll then moves as she lifts it not with her hand, but with her eyes.
Now you will be safe...
With one flick of her gaze, the danger has passed.
Butterflies in three colors flutter between the scrolls while light gradually fills the void.
I stand on a cloud and look up at the sun-like cloud hanging over the castle's peak.
Golden light flows forth, making Amahara Castle look unscathed again.
It's as though that ruthless battle never happened in the first place.
What? Everything's suddenly... back to normal.
Commander, what's going on?
Well, I mean–
Yooouuu...
Teeelll...
Meee...?
My voice becomes slowed and stretched, and my vision becomes fragmented and distorted.
The world instantly dissolves, and an endless void envelops it.

The Depths.say: Bathed in golden light, Amahara Castle appeared unscathed.
However, two people who ought to be there were missing.
Asama, Unzen... Where are Helena and the Commander?
I blinked for but a moment, and now they've vanished.
What is the meaning of this?! Where have they gone?!
I cannot sense them, but do not worry. It's possible they've–
KABOOOM!
A blue torrent tore the golden sky apart, immediately followed by protective magic circles manifesting one after the next.
One moment later, all sorts of floating battleships appeared in the sky above Amahara Castle.
Would someone care to explain what happened to the Commander?
Another blue torrent appeared and reduced several floating islands to rubble before barely being blocked by several swords made of purple light.
A guest though you may be, I suggest you mind your manners.
Please, all – let us be calm...
You want calm? Okay, then tell us where you hid the Commander.
We only just became aware that the Commander and Helena have disappeared. How could we be responsible?
Furthermore, who are you people? Why have you barged into Amahara? Are you trying to start a war?!
The only ones trying to start a war here are YOU people!
How DARE you!
Hakuhou, calm yourself. Let's hear what they have to say.
But Akagi...
Ahh... Helena.
You don't have to explain yourself, Shinano.
I just discovered that this has nothing to do with you.
It has everything to do with... her.
Helena META points to the golden cloud hovering in the sky.
DPSS FVB ZOVD FVBYZLSM? VY DVBSK FVB YHAOLY AOHA P LEWVZLK FVB? (Will you show yourself? Or would you rather that I exposed you?)
P DHZ UVA LEWLJAPUN AV ZLL ZBJO H NYHUK ZOVD VM MVYJL AVKHF... (I was not expecting to see such a grand show of force today...)
An array of gorgeous picture scrolls hung in the sky.
Who are you?!
Heheh... There was more than meets the eye to the Dream Stones after all.
Tell me, who are you? Where have you hidden the Commander?
FVB ZAPSS KVU'A NYHZW AOL ZPABHAPVU, KV FVB? (You still don't grasp the situation, do you?)
HSS P KPK DHZ HKQBZA AOL ZWHJL WOHZL (All I did was adjust the space phase.)
AOHA JVBSK UVA WVZZPISF THRL H WLYZVU CHUPZO PUAV AOPU HPY (That could not possibly make a person vanish into thin air.)
DOPSZA FVB IYVBNOA HU LUAPYL JVBUJPS BUTHUULK JVTIHA ZXBHKYVU (Whilst you brought an entire Council unmanned combat squadron.)
LEWSHPU FVBYZLSM – DOV HYL FVB? (Explain yourself – who are you?)
HUK DOV PZ AOPZ "JVTTHUKLY" FVB ZWLHR VM? (And who is this "Commander" you speak of?)
DOPJO WSHU HYL FVB YLMLYYPUN AV MYVT IHJR AOLU? (Which plan are you referring to from back then?)
FVB KVU'A OHCL AOL YPNOA AV RUVD (You don't have the right to know.)
HSS FVB ULLK AV RUVD PZ AOHA FVB'CL THKL H NYLHA TPZAHRL (All you need to know is that you've made a great mistake.)
What in the world are they blabbering about?
I'm afraid I don't know.
*sigh*...
I did a thorough scan. The Commander's still in Amahara.
Where may that be? I cannot sense that one.
The Depths.
PU AOL KLWAOZ, DOPJO DLYLU'A VYPNPUHSSF TLHUA AV LEPZA (In the depths, which weren't originally meant to exist.)
Do you really think you have the situation under control?
Blue rain began to pour over Amahara.
And the darkness reappeared.
What's happening? Why did the source appear anew?
Could it be related to this... "Commander's" disappearance?
...I thought you were a villain, but no, you're just an idiot.
Arizona, withdraw the fleet. We don't need it anymore.
Memphis, Kasumi, Vestal, stay here and help out.
And Houshou, you will focus single-mindedly on maintaining the Sky Realm's stability.
I'll deal with you later. There are more urgent things that take precedence.
And what are you going to do?
The thing that none of you could do. Find the missing person.

Stepping Into Amahara - Part 1.say: Well? It's not like you imagined, is it?
Amahara isn't just a place of beauty. Darkness and fear lurk under the surface.
Think about it carefully. What does the fear in the depths of your heart look like?
The things you want to avoid, to run from, to forget...
Sooner or later, they will all catch up with you.
The Sky Realm of Amahara is a prison.
Even we, its own creators, are under lock and key inside it.
It's silent. It's dark.
It's vast. It's endless.
Time and direction seem to have lost all meaning.
My consciousness tears apart, melts, and forms countless, thin branches that scatter through this void that stretches on forever.
At the ends of every little branch, I see it – the end.
Strengthless soldiers, burning tanks, sunken battleships, crumbled towers.
Tsunamis, earthquakes, illusory light, volcanoes, meteors, miasmic mist.
A black storm ravaging the land, a great wall of silver that connects sea and sky...
The branches link with each other, weaving together the entire world.
The end of the world...
Yes, that's it...
Even if I forget it, I am who I am... and this fear is part of me.
It's always been there, spreading and growing unseen inside of me...
Then, when nobody expected it, it silently came...
The scenery before me becomes more and more vivid. My consciousness begins to merge with this calamity.

sequence: "Welcome to the Sky Realm of Amahara."

Stepping Into Amahara - Part 1.say: What is this place?
Commander? Where are you?
Commandeeer!

sequence: "The Sky Realm of Amahara harbors infinite potential."
"What we want to create isn't just a mental protective barrier..."
"And certainly not merely a spiritual utopia."
"We need to go a step beyond that."
"Preservation of one's personality. Awakening of the consciousness. Immortality of the soul."
"Humanity will set forth on a journey."
"And this is our hope for the future."
"Welcome to the Sky Realm of Amahara."

Stepping Into Amahara - Part 2.say: It's me, Commander. Can you hear me?
The branches of my consciousness return all at once. My mind gradually becomes clear again.
I called to you several times, and you didn't respond. I thought you'd...
The tone in her voice suggests that she's almost on the verge of tears.
Don't worry about me, I'm fine. Why are you here as well, though?
I don't know... Where even are we? What is happening?
The simulacrum of the end has frozen in time at an unknown moment.
Now, Helena and I are trapped in a battlefield, a veritable sea of flames.
It happened again! The whole world changed in an instant!
As explosions and tongues of flame tear through the dark night, I can see my surroundings more clearly.
Isn't it... the Long Island Defense Line?

The Long Island Defense Line, Again.say: Blaring sirens that whip at my eardrums. The acrid stench of rising smoke. Incandescent plumes of fire.
The Long Island Defense Line has fallen, just as I remember it.
We were crushed terribly in our last-ditch counterattack, so this place will fall soon.
Our defenses are still holding for now, but that cannot last much longer.
They will come again with even greater numbers and raze this place to the ground, just as was planned.
Hey! What are you doing, staring off into space by yourself over there? The battle isn't over yet, so you can't be wandering around outside!
The others will come back and save you.
Hm? Surely not. If they're following the plan, there's no way they'd be able to leave.
They'll come back... I'm sure of it...
So...
Let's run away, together.
What?
Helena, do you think what we're seeing now is reality or an illusion?
An illusion... probably.
Look at the factions fighting in this place. It's like there's a mist covering them up.
I can't see them clearly, no matter how hard I strain my eyes.
Just as she says, everything here looks hazy and vague, like they're shrouded in mist.
The sea, the land, our allies, our foes – everything. I can only perceive them as "something."
I know what's happening, but the instant I try to identify anything – who our allies are, what equipment they have, what the enemy is, how many there are – the fog cuts it all off.
Either this place is constructed from insufficient information, or it's beyond my understanding. Whatever the case, this is an illusion.
But – even facsimiles contain a kernel of truth.
The Defense Line hasn't fallen yet, and Anzeel is still here.
Come with me, Helena. We're gonna look for Anzeel!

Operation: Rescue Anzeel.say: Helena and I push on through the Long Island Defense Line as shots fly all around us.
Although the mist obfuscates all detail, it does indicate when something is there, so I can intuitively see which places are safe and which aren't.
This allows us to advance without a hitch.
Helena and I proceed into an underground passage.
Like before, whenever we run into a fork in the road, I can tell which path leads to the command center and which doesn't, and I can also tell which doors we can open and which we can't.
Our progress is as smooth as can be, owing to this blessing in disguise.
We finally enter the bunker and stop at the entrance to the command center.
With a deep breath, I slowly push open the door.
Huh?
There's strangely no mist in the spacious hall. Everything is as clear as day.
Dr. Anzeel stands in front of a giant command console. She turns to us with a look of surprise.
Helena... Why are you back?
And my assistant, too... I don't...
This isn't right. If anyone was going to come, it'd be Enterprise... not you, Helena. And you, assistant, shouldn't be the one leading her here.
This wasn't in my plans, and it makes no sense... That can only mean this isn't real.
Fascinating...

The main ship – Amahara – hasn't even disembarked yet, but somehow, the changes in the astronomical environment that's caused by the guiding bunker's activation have already breached its protective barrier...
Hahah... This is that thing, you know? When you notice one strange thing, there's bound to be 100 more.
And then there's the way I look – I look like a girl in her 20s, for god's sake.
Pretty safe to assume this is some kind of dream, then, right?
Wonder what kind of dream. My last dream in the moments before I die? Or is it your dream, assistant? Or maybe... Did you create it, Helena?
Anzeel is extremely sharp this time around.
She grasped the situation in just a few seconds, and even got to the question at the heart of this whole thing.
You must be Dr. Anzeel. Nice to meet you. Um, I didn't create this place. The Commander and I just ended up here for some reason.
Ohh. You're not THE Helena, but you ARE Helena, that's for sure.
Then the Magister Plan was a success... and a glimmer of hope remains at Dusk.
Anzeel's expression suddenly brightens.
This can't be a dream in my dying moments... which leaves but one explanation. Assistant, this is your dream.
You don't look like you know what's going on, though, do you?
It's a long story...
I briefly explain to her what's happened in the Sky Realm of Amahara since we entered it.
I omit many things, but she clearly understands the picture I'm painting for her.
Hmm. So you theorize that this is a world born from fear. Yeah, that's certainly feasible in Amahara.
If it's the same Amahara I know, maybe the tunneling phenomenon has occurred?
One thing's for sure – this is fascinating. If only Ryouko were here to research it.
We're in the middle of a crisis, so I don't think we have time to do any research.
The pursuit of knowledge never ends as long as you live, you know. Besides–
Warning! Warning! Outer defense line is under attack. Communication lost with outposts 37, 38, and 39.
...Well, seems we'll have to end our conversation here.
Assistant, Helena, go somewhere else that's safe.
Aren't you coming with?
This is YOUR dream, assistant. I'm sure you'll find an exit on your own.
I, on the other hand... I'm staying here.
This place is like an inverse Pandora's box. It traps everything inside, letting only hope out.
And to ensure that hope makes it out, I'm going to stay here and carry out my final mission.
No.
You said it a minute ago – this is a dream, not reality. There's no need for you to stay and fulfill your mission.
Hope left the box, but some of it also remained.
I will not leave you behind.
To the best of my knowledge, Aoste's evacuation plan only includes Sirens and shipgirls, doesn't it?
Then there must still be people fighting for their lives somewhere.
Even if the apocalypse is inevitable, I don't think people will just sit and wait for it to come.
You're right. We still have EVA, ARK, and SUIHUO. But...
Anzeel suddenly falls quiet, blinks, and seems to ponder something.
Do you really want to save me?
Of course I do.
Then we'll go to EVA. That doomsday bunker is in the Rocky Mountains – should be the closest one from here.
In the Rockies? Okay. Are we going there by car? By plane?
What do you think? We'll go by the underground canals.
Come again? There are canals all the way from the Defense Line to the Rockies?
Well, yeah. It's the project you insisted on, remember?
At the time, regional teleporters had just been introduced – to the benefit of the war situation everywhere. And yet, you asserted that we needed an underground canal network.
Hell, we both worked our asses off to make Project Undercurrent come through. I don't think anyone could've imagined we'd use it one day.
Did you... predict this would happen?
You really are a giant mystery, assistant. I was right about you all along.
Warning! Warning! Enemy has breached the Central Defense Line. Communication lost with outposts 147, 148, and 149.
We can't stay here much longer. Come with me – I'll take you to the canals.

A Glimmer in the Strings.say: Helena and I follow Anzeel and leave the command center behind.
There is not a single trace of mist on the way. Everything I lay eyes on is crystal clear.
As a result, I've lost the ability to automatically open every door I come across.
Luckily, though, Anzeel helps us move forward without any problems.
After passing through several doors, we ride a capsule-shaped elevator down deeper underground.
As soon as the elevator doors open, a vast underground canal network unfolds before me. There are Antiochus transport ships on standby.
We board the vessel, after which the armored door begins to slowly close.
Amid the roar of the engines and the sound of the waves, we can finally breathe easy.
Anzeel engages the autopilot on the transport ship, puts on some coffee, and stares intently at a map of the canal network.
(This is an excellent chance to gain information. I should talk to her.)
More precisely, there are six of them all in all.
Each one belongs to a different project as well.
That said, once we decided to commit ourselves to the Magister Plan, all other projects were put on the backburner.
It became our top priority project, and we poured more than 90% of all our resources into it.
However, due to the gradual paralysis of global logistics, every continent was left with resources they couldn't dedicate to the Magister Plan. Some more, some less.
So, due to a multitude of circumstances, the other doomsday bunkers weren't completely thrown to the wayside.

Among the six bunkers, two were converted into guiding strongholds for the Final Magistration, and another one was a fortress for the mind that was launched into synchronous orbit. It was called "Amahara."
That leaves us with three. EVA, the one we're heading to, is in the Rockies, and it's where the remaining forces of the north and south of the New World are concentrated. It's also where Colette is.
Then there's ARK, located in the Alps, which serves as the base of Project Seed. It's run by Eutopia, and Maria might be there, too.
Finally, SUIHUO, situated in the Himalayas. It also serves as Project Flint, the first project to be activated, and it's the biggest in scope.
It's not really a single bunker – it'd be more accurate to call it a bunker complex. Dr. Li has always been in command over there.
That reminds me... Stephen Jr.'s fleet was blocked en route to ARK, and apparently they changed course and went to that one instead. Don't know the deets, sadly.
He's the one who came up with it, but I wouldn't strictly call it just HIS project anymore.
It would become the judgment that we would collectively administrate.
It would judge our future. It would judge the future of Antiochus and the shipgirls. And, it would judge the future of all worlds that would become test sites.
But... it is also the last judgment we could make.
Otherwise, the light of human civilization would be snuffed out, and there would be no "futures" to speak of.
Ah, the Auroral City... I haven't heard that name in a long time.
Well, now, it's been divided into two guiding bunkers – the Gate of Dawn, and the Gate of Judgment.
One is in the South Pole, and the other's in the North Pole. Together, they make up a device that can manipulate the planet's magnetic field.
Solar activity is currently at its peak, so by fine-tuning the two guiding bunkers, we've created the optimal astronomical conditions for the execution of the "Final Magistration".
The Gate of Dawn – in the South Pole – is led and defended by Admiral Mikhail and half of the Council's Task Force and the Northern Parliament's fleet.
As for the Gate of Judgment in the North Pole, that's where the Antiochus System's mainframe, the Natural Calculation System, and Laplace's Demon have all been moved.
Also, since the Final Magistration is beginning soon, Aoste is leading the other half of the Council's Task Force and Antiochus' main fleet to defend that place.
Shipgirls from across the world and Antiochus patrols have been continuously gathering there as well.
Final evacuation plan? In regard to the Final Magistration, I assume?
Well... Ostensibly, it's a massive offensive.
The shipgirls will group up with Antiochus' main force, use Laplace's Demon to advance into a higher dimension, and completely annihilate X.
We've been on a losing streak, and this is a Hail Mary of an operation we've been forced into. The risk is immense, but imagine the reward...
At least, that's what people believe it is.
It's to make sure panic doesn't break out.
A white lie emphasizing just one part of the truth.
If the Magister Plan does succeed, it'll be one hell of an offensive.
But, even if we do win, the fruits of victory will not be for us to claim.
Does Enterprise know the truth? Do any of the shipgirls?
Part of it, yeah. Like the fact that, once they leave, they're never coming back.
Though, they don't know that the Final Magistration is about to start, or that Aoste and I are evacuating.
Humanity cannot outwit Laplace's Demon... We should've all taken that to heart a long time ago.
But those girls – they're convinced that we members of the Council are special. Everyone thinks we are.
You know – "They're with the Council! They'll find some way to evacuate us, I just know it!"
So we managed to fool them by spreading the Council's members across the globe.
The truth is, there aren't any special people. Not a single...
...No, maybe there is.
You. You might be truly special.
Because you managed to truly escape!
Wasn't my escape a part of the plan you all devised?
I... don't remember that.
Weird... It's not like me to forget something like this.
Right, didn't you say something about "forgetting a lot of things?"
"A lot" is putting it lightly. I lost almost all my memories.
I forgot more than I even know. Like the shipgirls that managed to evacuate, and most things about Antiochus.
It feels like I was split into a million pieces, and I'm now merely the biggest piece among them all.
You don't remember...
Not remembering – that might be the key to this project.
It's just a hunch, but...
Did you figure something out?
Sorry, assistant, but I think I should tell you as little as possible about the things you don't know about.
Now even YOU'RE giving me this treatment... Here I thought I'd get this rare opportunity to ask you so many things.
Even I? Who else has been "giving you this treatment?"
Helena. The very same one who escaped from here.
She seems like she knows so much, but never tells me more than I need to know, and won't say more than that.
Helena...
Sounds like she's been pushing herself harder than she should ever since the Lexington Fleet incident...
You saved her once in the past, but now, she's the one guiding you...
I can't help you any more than I already have, assistant. Please, just don't do anything crazy.
We will shortly arrive at your destination. Please check to make sure you have all your belongings with you before you disembark the ship.
We're here already? That was way too fast...
Let's go out and have a look.

Operation: Rescue Anzeel 2.0.say: When we disembark, we are greeted not by the underground canal, but by the sea.
...This is NY Harbor.
Even in a dream, I just can't seem to get away from this place.
She's clearly disheartened for a moment, but she promptly cheers up.
I'm destined to be here, so of course I can't leave. You're different, though.
I'll stay here – you take a ship to EVA.
Maybe this is nothing more than a dream after all.
I may be trapped in here, but there are people on the outside working to rescue me as we speak.
I happen to have faith in them, which means there's no need for ME to try and find a way out. I just need to buy time.
And if that's all I need to do, then what does it matter where I do it?
I won't be going to EVA.
Let's defend NY Harbor for as long as we can together.
...Well, alright. NY Harbor it is!
After our arrival, Anzeel commandeers an unmanned military vehicle and drives us to Urban Defense Headquarters.
Throughout the car's slow advance, the hazy city gradually takes shape.
Some of the buildings still have their lights on, but it feels strikingly empty here. Desolate.
The most common sight here is robots on group patrols. Sometimes, cars pass by.
They're all soldiers who fell back from the Long Island Defense Line. Some are staying here in NY City, and the rest will leave for EVA.
This city's streets are otherwise deserted. Only when we pass by skyscrapers do we see signs of civilian life inside.
They seem to be working on something alongside the city police force.
To be honest with you, NY Harbor and the Long Island Defense Line were both bait. There were never going to be any civilians here.
But some civilians just refuse to evacuate to EVA.
Some of them don't want to move. Some of them just don't want to give up their home to the enemy that easily.
I respect their decisions.
As the car passes through a park, I spy a familiar building.
Is that... the university?
We can go wherever and do whatever. We're the masters of our own destinies! For today, anyway.
Aw hell yeah! Way to go, Doc!
Although I think some sort of plan would be good to have. Where are we going, exactly?
Let me think... Oh, hey, it's almost lunchtime! I know a good café Aoste told me about years ago.
I dunno if they're still around, but if they are, we'll grab something to eat!
After that, we could do some window shopping, then go to the movie theater.
So the plan is to wing it as usual? Fantastic... Oh well, it's at least worth it to check out the café.
Could you tell me the name of it? I'll look them up and see if they're still open.
Sure. It's called "Granate."
Spelled like pomegranate, right? I think I see it.
I wonder how Granate is doing right now.
Whoa! You still remember that place?
I guess I'm not surprised. Their food was amazing.
Sadly, they closed up a few years back. We couldn't go if we wanted.
Beyond that is a commercial district.
Wait, first, let's take a group selfie! Northampton, you do the honor with your drone.
Make sure you get all of us, Bonnie included, in the frame.
Y'know, she'd probably be livid if she learned we went on a date with the Professor without her...
But if her face is in the picture, you can at least say she was there in spirit, right?
How does that sound, Professor? Over here, you can stand in the middle. Hammann, Langley, scoot over a bit. Yorktown, you can stand right beside the Professor.
And I'll be riiight here. Everyone ready? Say "cheese" on three. One, two...
I walked here with Yorktown once upon a time.
It's just a neon-lit shadow of its former self now.
Finally, after passing through several military checkpoints, we reach Urban Defense HQ.
This is where we'll be setting up shop.
Let's go take command, you two.
Can't wait to see what scraps are left for us.

Preliminary Prep.say: There's basically nothing here!
Anzeel grimaces at the information we find in the command center.
One Type-I Antiochus fleet, four standard Urban Defense drone fleets...
Half of the Council's combined fleet post Long Island withdrawal, under 2,000 city guards...
That's a drop in a bucket in a place as big as this.
If we focused all of our forces on the Long Island Defense Line, we could protect the city for one more day, tops.
...We'll just have to use space to buy time.
Yup. That's our only option with defenses as slim as they are. We'll have to gradually give up more than 90% of the city.
The defense system is still functioning, though, and we have enough ammo to last us.
Are there any nearby fleets that can support us?
Even if this city is considered bait, bait works better the longer it distracts the enemy.
Unfortunately, they're all gone. Union forces all moved to EVA.
What about Council forces?
Nada. The last three fleets in the area have all been moved to Long Island.
In short, we need to make do with what we have on hand.
Fortunately, Helena is here. You can't underestimate shipgirls, even if there's only one.
I may be able to procure support from the outside.
Suddenly, a familiar figure appears out of thin air.
Greetings, familiar stranger.
What?
She's from "here," assistant.
Why are you here, Akagi?
The Sky Realm administrative terminal found an abnormality here, so I came to look.
(This Akagi isn't a physical being, but a projection?)
Wow, so even the Sky Realm of Amahara is trapped in this dream? Fascinating.
What do you all think?
It is fascinating. Unusual, moreover.
We understand the situation, and what's more, we've come up with a solution.
Familiar stranger, this dream is yours. Who do you think is most likely to be here at this time?
Hmm... I came here from Amahara, so the others who were there at the time might have tagged along.
Akagi, Unzen, Hakuhou, Asama, and I-404's group.
The META Helena, too. She's noticed that something is wrong and is trying to locate me right now.
I wouldn't be surprised to see her, along with the META Memphis and Vestal.
Understood. I will return to Amahara and devise a plan with the administrative terminal.
Before I go, there is one thing I must ask...
If everyone in a dream awakens, yet the dream continues independent of them... can you still call it a dream?
It continues independent of them...
Heehee. Take all the time you need to think about it.
If we meet again, you may tell me your answer then.
Akagi vanishes. Anzeel, Helena, and I all look at each other in astonishment.
They must have realized something was wrong in this dream and immediately fingered you as the cause.
That's the fortress of the mind for you – formidable even in the dream world.
KABOOOM!
Well, it sounds like they broke through the Long Island Defense Line. Gear up for battle!

Imprisoned.say: As more enemies flood in from the Long Island Defense Line, flames of war intensify near NY Harbor.
Artillery, missiles, lasers, electromagnetic weapons... There are even weapons of war that I can't comprehend.
The city's defense system operates at full power, throwing everything at the inscrutable enemy I know to be X. But right now, they appear only as misty, writhing shadows.
I refuse to send Helena into battle. Anzeel pretends not to see, her silence speaking volumes.
I'm sure she thinks I just want her back at HQ to cover my ass.
However, the Helena from my world line is not as powerful as the one Anzeel is familiar with. This battlefield is not one she is ready for.
I simply did not want Anzeel to misjudge our combat capabilities and deploy our forces incorrectly as a result.
Several hours pass. Despite the defense system's firepower, the X continue to encroach on the coast.
All throughout the city, strong winds start to whip up and grow in intensity.
Pardon my repeated intrusion.
As the situation continues to worsen, she appears again.
Tell me, familiar stranger, have you felt anything... special, as of late?
Special? Uh... Not really.
The girls pursuing you aren't far now.
There's just some repulsive force at work, keeping them from finding just the right frequency.
The Sky Realm Administrative Terminal tried to correct this problem, but it failed.
This problem must be beyond what forces it can work within a dream.
For some reason, she keeps looking in Anzeel's direction.
What does Ryouko think of all this?
She thinks it's a mental prison.
I see.
What's going on here?
...Sorry.
Just like before, we couldn't make it to EVA... because of me.
*sigh*...
She heaves a sigh of apparent... relief?
Thank you, assistant. For giving me this fleeting dream.
Anzeel... You're not making any sense.
Only then do I realize that the pistol usually slung around her waist... is firmly within her grasp.
Take care, my friends. I wish you the best.
BANG!
She collapses into a pool of blood.

sequence: P R I S O N

Imprisoned.say: {playername}！
Stay calm, please.
*pant*... *pant*...
Commander?! What's gotten into you?
In the command room, Helena rushes over to me anxiously.
(Helena? It's just... Helena?)
Something is wrong.
What happened to Akagi and Anzeel?
Akagi... and Anzeel?
They were just here. I mean, Anzeel has been with us the whole time. You don't... remember?
Hmm? It's just been the two of us in here.
Helena... Did I position the defenses of NY Harbor?
Yeah. After our retreat from the Long Island Defense Line, you brought me here to NY City.
You said we needed to deploy defenses here to buy time, and that reinforcements would come soon.
...I get it.
I get it...
BEEP BEEP!
(Found you.)
(Helena?!)
(Sorry. This took longer than I thought it would.)
(Don't move a muscle. Reinforcements are coming.)

Preliminary Prep 2.0.say: Less than a minute after Anzeel's disappearance, Memphis META led a fleet into the battlefield.
NY Harbor would be safe, for now.
Shortly after...
Commander, are you okay?!
I'm just fine. You couldn't have come at a better time.
Thank goodness... We were so worried.
I'm so sorry. We never could have dreamed...
Hmph. I knew there was something fishy about this sudden technological breakthrough.
I know your invitation was well-intentioned.
I seem to be the reason that everything went wrong. If anything, I owe you an apology for getting Amahara tangled up in this mess.
You mustn't blame yourself!
Then, that goes for all of you as well. None of you have anything to apologize for.
Honestly, I've heard the word "sorry" more than enough times for one day.
And besides, we should be focusing on what to do next.
Memphis, has Helena said anything?
When can we go home?
Helena is working with the Yamato-class girls and Houshou to construct a stable evac route as soon as possible.
What we need to do is hold out.
...Did you say Houshou?
Yeah! Trust me, I was just as surprised!
EVERYONE was shocked when she appeared. I mean, she just popped up out of nowhere!
Either way, we got the Dream Stone from her.
Helena was pissed. If she knew Houshou was involved, she wouldn't have let you come until she got to the bottom of everything.
Well, nobody knew, so there's no point in regret.
Nobody is omniscient. Even the best-laid plans can be overturned by the unexpected.
Only by accepting the unexpected can we use it to our advantage.
For example...
I had plans just a while ago, but our shortage of firepower made them impossible to carry out.
But now? That's not so much of a problem.
Commander {playername}, the Sakuran fleet awaits your orders.
Great. I'd like to deploy defenses in the following areas...

Defensive Area A.say: Following a strategy briefing, the Sakuran fleet split into two – one led by Asama, and one led by Unzen – and each headed to a different defensive area.
Asama, have you noticed the same thing as I?
The bustling cityscape and the defensive installations that just supported us, I mean.
They all seemed exceptionally advanced and outlandish. Why is the Commander dreaming of these things, I wonder?
As I'm sure you've noticed, much of this dream is rather hazy and vague.
It's as though they're shrouded by mist. It's plausible that {playername}, too, knows not why this dream appears the way it does.
I see. It's fortunate that this space is in some ways similar to Amahara.
It doesn't impair my combat abilities – in fact, I feel somewhat empowered compared to normal.
This is all to say, I should be able to compensate for others' difficulties later when it comes to a battle with the nightmares.
Heh! You're not the only one! Kotama's aching to take down a horde of monsters!
How wonderful that you're all so motivated. Why don't we bolster our spirits with a dash of Cloudsea Wine, hm?
Having wine before a battle sounds ill-advised.
Why be so strict with yourself? Have we not been blitzing through the enemy's vanguard since our very arrival here?
Besides, who knows when the next group will show up?
Exchanging cups sounds to me like a much better use of our time than idly standing around.
If you were to drink Cloudsea Wine, would you also gain its benefits even in this place?
Who knows? Whether it grants its benefits or not, it still tastes superb.
Fine wine is just the thing that would enrich this fantastical dream journey.
Although, it's a shame the moon will not show itself... For want of its presence, the atmosphere is lacking.
Well, I'll have the honor of the first drink, then. Cheers!

Defensive Area B.say: Memphis' unit passed through a desolate district of the city before arriving at their defensive area.
Has anyone else noticed how the Commander seems to be feeling awful?
So I'm not the only one who felt that. I've never seen the Commander like this before.
Something bad must've happened before we got here.
A case of witnessing an event that opened up old scars, perhaps?
Such a thing may get under our skin, but the Commander hardly remembers anything, no?
There was that time when Helena used the Sea of Stars to run a simulation of NY City. The Commander participated in that.
I was deployed on a mission when that occurred.
I can hardly believe you succeeded in something so dangerous.
In fact, I must ask – how DID you achieve it?
Constructing a simulacrum of test site alpha is no easy task, even for Antiochus.
The enormous quantity of missing data, the highly advanced technology, the absurdly powerful adversaries... It's dangerous and hard to control in the extreme.
Even if you are successful in simulating it, it holds almost no meaning.
One may be able to replicate the places, but not the people. It would be a hollow shell of a city, much like this place.
Yeah, but... we had the Tower. That's how we did it.
We created a special world slice based on records, then created the people, then employed a unique method to grant intelligence to the people who were important.
...Absurd. That's what it was.
You're right. Looking back on it, it was a bit absurd.
But if the chance really presented itself to you, would you not take it?
Would you not want to see it one more time? Those bustling streets, the people we've lost...
Ow... My head...
Take it easy, Memphis.
No more thinking. It's bad for your mental stability.
Ugh... Thanks.
Okay, I won't dwell on it.
Let's stay focused. We've found the Commander, so things are gonna get better from here on!

Defensive Area C.say: Unzen absentmindedly followed the road, and arrived at the defensive area before she knew it.
Unzen, we've arrived.
Unzen!
Hm? Yes? What is it?
I said we've arrived.
Oh, right. That we have.
Well? What now?
Now, we...
Um... Hey, nothing really bad's happened yet.
There's no need for that doom and gloom, okay?
If you need to vent, you can take it out on the enemy.
Yes...
Daisen, Watarase, hold her for me.
The Dragon God shall give her her finest remedy!
What are you going to do?
A little click and a snap! Take a photo, in other words!
I'm going to get a good picture of her looking all distracted!
I'd prefer it if you didn't...
And I'd prefer it if you stopped beating yourself up. The Commander isn't completely out of the woods yet.
*sigh*... Understood.
Let's fight back first, and save the thinking for later.

A Dash of Crimson.say: Everyone except for Helena has left the headquarters to head to their designated defensive area.
Meanwhile, I walk around the building's transparent observation deck, surveying the city.
The entire metropolis has become increasingly blurry ever since Anzeel went away.
The citizens, the police, even the autonomous combat units – everything capable of independent movement has vanished without anyone noticing.
All that remains is this well-lit decoy. This shell of a city, empty yet ostensibly bustling.
This really is just a dream...
The only good thing is that the city's automated defense system is still running...
No, wait – it's also good that it's just a dream. We're not truly fighting X, just the ghastly outlines of it.
Anzeel said that Amahara is floating high above in orbit.
It's an honest-to-god spaceship. I wonder what it looks like...
How would I find it? The night is dark, and even the moon isn't out...
*sigh*...
If only I knew how long we have to hold out for...
Unless... If we go back to the underground canals now, will we be able to reach EVA?
For some reason, my thoughts are all jumbled, and I can't calm myself down no matter how I try.
Before I catch a glimpse of a dash of crimson, I suddenly hear a voice from behind me.
Your mind is in many places, I see.
Akagi?
You've lost your composure, and your perception and judgment are both dull.
I can't imagine a better opportunity than this to take you down.
You don't have any reason to.
Heehee...
What if I told you...
I do, because I'm not who you think I am?
Huh?!
Who are you?! Where's Helena?! What'd you do to her?!
Ahahahahaha!
I never imagined I'd see our celebrated Commander jump back in fear!
Just kidding. It's only me.
As for that guard of yours, I distracted her with a false alarm. It'll be a few more minutes before she comes back.
Wait, so why are you...?
I was feeling a bit playful, that's all.
Say, you don't look so good. Did something bad happen before I got here?
A LOT of things happened... A nightmare. But thankfully, only a nightmare.
May I ask why you're here?
I'm fairly sure the other Sakurans have left for their respective defensive areas.
Indeed they have.
And... you didn't go with them?
Asama gave me the impression that the Sakuran fleet – you included – would follow my orders.
Have you forgotten already, Commander? I was let go from all my official positions.
I'm a free woman, and if I wish to stay here, then stay I can.
I don't have to follow your orders. Not that I ever had to.
...Fine. Do as you please, then.
Wait, there's one thing I've been meaning to ask.
You temporarily underwent METAmorphosis. Did you feel anything out of the ordinary after that happened?
Or did you encounter anything unusual?
Actually, I never underwent METAmorphosis due to Wisdom Cube corrosion. It was just a false reflection of myself.
Speaking of unusual occurrences, though... Yes, something does come to mind.
Have you ever experienced something akin to speaking with your inner demons?
That vixen was only a reflection of me, and yet, we got into a heated argument.
She not only knew a lot about me, but also seemed to have a mind of her own.
In the end, I couldn't really tell what she truly was.
I'm not sure if that fits your idea of "something unusual," but regardless.
Why did you ask, anyway? That question came rather out of nowhere.
Well, I was just wondering if maybe she's watching us from a higher dimension.
A higher dimension?
She turns her gaze skyward, and all she sees are the dark clouds growing ever thicker.
Or maybe she's gone. It's a chaotic, confusing dream, so who knows?
*pant*... *pant*... Akagi, I went and checked!
That system alert was just a false alarm. There was no intruder all this time.
Thanks for watching the Commander while I was gone!
Heehee. You're welcome.
Helena...
Hm?
Actually, never mind.
The battle's about to begin. We should get back to the underground shelter.
What about you, Akagi?
I'm not going there with you.
Naturally, I'm not going to the front lines either.
I think I'll stay right here. The view from the observation deck... is enough to make one's heart flutter.
Very well. Stay safe.
Of course. You too, Commander.

The Black Wall.say: The writhing nightmares finally resumed their offensive.
Along with the rumbling of towering waves, a black wall rose in front of everyone's eyes.
That black wall... Is it what I think it is?
Yes. The nightmares have coalesced.
We vanquished them once only for them to return en masse like this...
This is going to be a little... tricky.
I have an idea! We ought to compromise its structural integrity, like trying to collapse a dam!
Focus fire on a single point, in other words, then.
Psh! That's easy!
Kotama, cut open a path for us! Let's dance!
A wall of black...
Thank the heavens this is but a dream. In reality, these nightmares would manifest as something far worse than a wall.
Is this... what NY City stared down in its final moments?
This time, we will help the city see another day.
For the Commander! And for the duty we failed to fulfill!
Everyone, the enemy force has revealed itself.
I wonder if the seadrake can handle this many of them...
It seems I must release some of my anchors.
They are but phantoms at the end of the day. We need only cut them all down.
Now this is a sight to behold.
Is this what your past is like?
Is this the root of your fear?
It's... out of this world.
Alas, I'm sure that once we return, our memories will all be "blurred".
Hey, other me – I know you can hear me.
Listen. I don't want to forget any of what's happened today.
So lend me a hand.
Commander, the enemy's main force is approaching the coast, and all allied fleets have begun engaging.
Send this reminder to all fleets: Don't charge in, but don't stand your ground in vain either.
Retreat to the next area immediately when your current one is lost. All three fleets must take turns covering each other's retreats.
Above all, don't forget that our mission is to stall for time.
Roger!
Whew...
Alright, black wall. Let's see what you're made of.

Not a Moment Too Soon.say: Great waves rocked the sea's surface even before the black wall approached.
After the waves came tempestuous gales, then torrential rain.
Enemies kept pouring out of the wall, despite the countless blows dealt to it.
The front-line fleet's range of engagement was shrinking at a rate far beyond expectations.
There was no changing the tide of the battle, even with the whole city providing fire support.
In the meanwhile, Hakuhou and I-404 attempted close-range reconnaissance.
However, black and highly viscous seawater and rain stopped them before they could get close. The enemy even nearly surrounded them.
When I heard of this, I again strongly reminded all fleets not to take any risks, and hastened the defensive line's retreat.
And so, within a short three hours, I had withdrawn all our fleets past the coastal defense line before anyone made any contact with the black wall.
As the wall slowly approaches the coastline, the rainstorm over the city becomes even more intense.
Thick, dark clouds swirl into a helix shape, like a gathering drillhead – it's a sign that a black tornado is forming.
To make matters worse, the rain is gradually getting darker, accumulating into pools all over the city from which new enemies begin to creep out.
No wonder Anzeel considered abandoning ninety percent of the city from the very beginning...
But then, right at that moment, the ruthless winds stop.
Three dazzling rays of light rip open the sky, and butterflies in three different colors emerge from the cracks.
They flutter off in all directions, and wherever they go, the wind stops, the rain clears, and all traces of the nightmares vanish.
Are those... butterflies?
These tricolored butterflies represent the powers of the Venerable Three.
They've sent us backup!
Heheh. Looks like they managed to find a stable route.
Whew... Helena came through for us!
We should start preparing to retreat, everyone.
Still, I implore you to remain on your guard.
Yes... It's finally over.
The butterflies flutter unimpeded through space, even filling up the shelter with their presence.
They fly round and round in circles as they start to form loose vortices.
Commander! The butterflies are enveloping us!
I guess that's how they're going to bring us back.
It's finally over...
I relax my shoulders and let their glistening wings envelop me.
As lights flood my vision, it's as if I'm able to see through the roof of the shelter and into the ruptured clouds above.
There, up in the sky, shimmers a dazzling aurora.
The light around me grows brighter, and I bathe in it.

As Blue as the Sea.say: When the light subsides, I see a city as quiet as death itself.
What?
...I'm still in NY City?
What's going on here?
Helena?
Memphis?
Akagi?
Unzen?
There is no response. Our comms channel is just as dead silent as the deserted city around me.
...I'm all alone.
...Prison.
Perceiving the prison drives a phantom into madness.
It's this prison that traps Anzeel. That keeps her from escaping.
Does that mean that my perceiving it has trapped me, too?
Is it because I know too much about the past now?
Have I become intrinsically linked with this world?
There is no answer to my question.
Because nobody is here to answer it.
After all, I exist alone in this city now.
A black wall suddenly comes into view.
I gaze at it.
It seems to gaze back at me.
The air is silent, but I seemingly can hear the cacophony within.
Within that encroaching wall is a storm of madness trying to break free.
Is this what the real Anzeel saw in her last moments, too?
Nobody's here to back me up now. This isn't a carefully curated experiment.
No reinforcements. They all left.
Then the Magister Plan was a success... and a glimmer of hope remains at Dusk.
You. You might be truly special.
Because you managed to truly escape!
Assistant, go somewhere else that's safe.
Sorry, assistant.
Thank you, assistant. For giving me this fleeting dream.
BANG!
No... I can't let it end this way.
They'll realize I didn't make it out with them.
I just need to buy time until they come back.
Of course! I can still go to EVA.
I'll go to the underground canal...
Find a transport ship...
No matter what, I have to survive!
I run desperately through the deserted streets.
When I fall, I get up again, and I repeat the process when I fall once more.
The black wall gradually engulfs the levees. It isn't far behind me.
And then...
Helena META's voice whispers in my ears.
It's as gentle as a breeze.
I look to the source of that breeze...
And there she stands.
...Helena? Is that you?
As much as I pride myself on my rich knowledge and experience, even I'm stunned by what I see.
She's enormous. As if the world itself could fit in the palm of her hand.
At the same time a distant projection and a firm figure atop the heavens.
Three rings descend one after another and spin above the city.
A blue light condenses between them.
The black wall exudes a sense of... panic.
Twisted nightmares begin appearing out of thin air and swarming in from all directions.
They've realized that something is amiss.
And so they rush to overwhelm me.
The rings vibrate, bathing the city in a torrent of blue.
I hear the enraged, resentful shrieks of the once-silent nightmares.
The black wall begins to crumble. It becomes a black wind, then a cloud, and then mist.
But no matter where I go, whether I approach or retreat...
It never enters the city, remaining just beyond the edges of the rings.
There's a soft sound akin to a bubble popping.
All the blackness in the world vanishes at once.
The blue giant smiles at me...
...And the world collapses.
I bathe in light as blue as the sea.

Farewell.say: This time, the light doesn't fade immediately.
I feel as if it's cradling me, carrying me down a winding path.
I can't see her, but I can feel her presence by my side.
Yeah, it's me... You're safe now.
After this... you must leave the Sakura Empire as quickly as you can.
Talk with Yamato before you go. She's on the right path, so she mustn't give up.
Don't stay in the Iris Orthodoxy, either. Find an excuse to pay a visit to the Royal Navy.
The META Elizabeth is there. There's no safer place for you than with her.
I... have to leave you for a while.
I've made a decision. A very important once.
For us... and for those we've lost.
Don't worry. We'll meet again before long.
Until then, take care of yourself.

Epilogue.say: Once the light has faded, I see a complex of luxurious buildings rising above a sea of clouds.
Hakuhou, Akagi, Unzen, Helena, and Memphis META... Everyone from the dream is here.
They all seem like they just got back, too. Everyone looks at me with a smile on their face.
Everything in that dream had happened in mere moments in reality. Nobody even notices that I've fallen a little bit behind.
Is it really over this time?
Yeah... I think so!
Hold on, everyone.
We just woke up from a profound nightmare. If anything feels amiss, you need to speak up right away.
Hmm... Nothing wrong here.
But for some reason, I can't remember what I was doing just now.
Same here... It's like I just woke up from a drunken dream.
Does anyone else feel like we were in the middle of a big fight?
Yeah! In some coastal city, right?
Huh? It wasn't by a lake?
I do believe it was a river...
Hmm... Was it?
...Maybe. It eludes me, too.
Wow. Even Unzen can't remember it.
Akagi, do you remember anything?
...I'm afraid I'm just as clueless as the rest of you.
It was a very different dimension, so it's normal for our memories to come out fuzzy.
Still, it was a nightmare. Better for everyone to forget it.
Hmm... Maybe you're right.
Heh...
Looks like everyone is safe, so we're gonna head out soon.
What about you, Commander?
...I think I'd like to leave for now.
Until you've ironed out the kinks here, I don't want to stay for too long.
That's totally understandable.
I'll show you the way to Ama no Tobira right away.

sequence: A Dance for Amahara Above - The End

Amahara Forevermore.say: After returning to Ama no Tobira from Amahara, Unzen escorts me to where Yamato is.
To my surprise, however, I find only Ikazuchi and Inazuma waiting for me. Yamato herself is nowhere to be seen.
"We meet again, {playername}."
Is that... you, Yamato?
You invited me to come, and you still won't show yourself?
"Oh, but I am here."
"I am all things that you saw on your way here."
What?
Are you saying you've merged with Ama no Tobira?
"It had to be done for Amahara's sake."
Why?
"A truth regarding the Wisdom Cubes surely hasn't escaped you – that they aren't required for us to materialize."
"You beheld it with the Rite of Resurrection. We have no need even for physical bodies."
"So I ask you: What DO we need? Where does our essence lie?"
In a network that... links Wisdom Cubes together?
"Precisely. I forsook a physical body so that I may explore this limitless domain."
"Alas, on this one occasion, I was foolhardy."
"I was much too hasty."
It wasn't all your fault. Part of the blame lies with me.
We both underestimated this place.
However, it is true that this place has limitless potential.
As long as you stick to your original plans and aren't tempted by seemingly miraculous technology, I'll keep supporting your endeavor.
Together, we can grow the Sky Realm into a bunker for the mind.
"By our own hands shall we protect our home."
"That is my wish."

A Crimson Farewell.say: After saying goodbye to Yamato, Akagi told me that she wanted to see me one more time before I leave the Sakura Empire.
How did you like your journey into the Sky Realm of Amahara?
It turned into something completely different from what I originally expected.
I understand why you were grumpy at the table earlier. It was because of the Dream Stones.
Did you already know what they really were back then?
Heh. They don't have the experience of being deceived that I do.
Sounds like you've come to terms with it.
What does it matter if I've come to terms with it or not?
Now that I'm here, in the Sky Realm, it's no exaggeration to say my fate is intertwined with its own.
I refuse to die in my sleep one day without knowing what happened.

options.content: You mean our promise to travel together?

A Crimson Farewell.say: Oh, on another note – this didn't count as fulfilling our promise.
Heh. It's nothing.
Just know that I don't plan on being stuck in Amahara for the rest of my days.
The next time we meet, I'll be sure to remind you.
We've said all that needs to be said. I'm sure you don't want to linger here, so let's go.
Yes, that one.
Just know that I don't plan on being stuck in Amahara for the rest of my days.
The next time we meet, in reality, I will host a most wonderful banquet at my estate just for you.
After that, I'll take you to see everything there is to see.
Sounds nice. I can't wait.
Good. Now, it's time for you to head back.
I hope that the next time we meet, those nightmares won't show up again to spoil the fun.
Wait, "those nightmares"?
You... remember what happened?
Heheh. Perhaps.

Helena's Resolve.say: In a garden surrounded by stars, an important dialogue was being held.
Have you already made up your mind?
I have.
Who is it for this time? The Commander, or yourself?
It's for everyone. Every last one of us.
Don't you think there are too many uncontrollable variables in this plan?
With enough determination, anything is possible.
Sure, there's some risk, but we've been accumulating power for this very moment.
The Commander's life shouldn't be like this. Our world shouldn't be like this, either.
You, me, those people... Not a single person should have to endure this.
As the silver lining of this incident, the last piece has fallen into place.
We don't have to worry about the prison anymore.
Add to that the environment created by the cross-border experiments, and the forces on our side.
We have the right time, place, and people. Now is our best opportunity.
I'll give you that the META Elizabeth will support us, but what about the Ashes?
They still have yet to respond.
They're just watching from the side for the moment. They haven't found bait that's sweet enough yet.
But they will find it eventually, and then they'll jump into action. I guarantee it.
Nobody can stop what's going to happen. Not even Friedrich der Große.
Just you wait...

Everything Will Be Fine.say: It was time for me to leave the Sakura Empire.
Helena META wouldn't tell me to do something without a good reason.
I gave Elizabeth a call. She promptly came up with an excuse to request my assistance.
Assuming all goes according to plan, I will officially receive orders to visit the Royal Islands as soon as my plane lands.
Amidst their journey, a sense of drowsiness crept into the air.
Subsequently, one passenger fell into a dream.
Is this... a battlefield?
The entire world seems to be ablaze.
The seas. The clouds. Even the bolts of lightning falling from the sky.
Something's not right. It's just like before...
Did the Commander end up here, too?
I've got to look...
Helena tried to whip up the water to block off the heat, but she couldn't move a single step from where she stood.
It's so hot... It burns...
I need to... get out of here, now...
A nearby wreckage provided temporary shelter from the heat, allowing her to catch her breath if only for a moment.
Then, she saw more of the battlefield.
Louis... Saratoga... Lexington!
Don't go there! It's dangerous! What are you all doing?
No! Come back!
A firestorm swept them up in an instant. Their little fleet vanished in the bright light.
NOOO!
*gasp*!
Just a dream... Calm down, Helena... It was just a dream...
Everything's okay...
She raised her handheld mirror and saw the sweat-streaked face reflected in it.
For a moment, the reflection bore the countenance of someone else. Familiar, but not hers.
But, the very next moment, her reflection returned to normal.
...Was it just my imagination?
She looked at it over and over, but whatever she saw did not show itself again.
It must've been my eyes playing tricks on me after that dream...
It was nothing... Everything is fine...
You told me everything will be fine as long as I stay by the Commander's side...
And I trust that you're right, other me.
I don't know what you're planning to do...
But stay safe, wherever you are.

Sweet Bait.say: Saratoga stared at the files placed in front of her with a look of incredulity, rereading them several times.
You're telling me the experiments finally yielded results?!
That after all this time, we finally have something to show for our efforts?!
Yes. I reviewed this report twice before submitting it. It is absolutely feasible, in theory.
After a series of advancements built on top of the Type II rigging's technological framework, we've finally found a solution that will work for Lexington!
I gotta report this to the Commander right now!
Wait, no... This is just a plan. A feasible plan, but still. I need something more concrete first!
I'll have to distribute this plan across all our departments, give it top priority, and then...
Well, on that topic–
I'm gonna go talk to Alaska and Missouri.
Alright.
Before I go...
Get TB to prepare to activate the Galactic Core. I want to see it for myself!
KABOOOM!
Enterprise and Essex META appear on the ocean's surface with a boom.
...They're getting close.
This chase has gone on long enough. Time to settle this.
Look... They've come.
A swarm of countless drones blotted out the cloudy sky, and shortly thereafter, a fleet of floating battleships entered their view.
Alerted by the explosion from just moments ago, the fleet had shifted into a combat-ready formation.
That formation... It's them. A Council Task Force.
They've finally caught up.
Neither of the two was fazed even with countless guns aimed at them. They simply stood silently on the sea's surface.
They were waiting for the moment someone from the fleet would show up, and ask them about their objective.
Finally, a figure broke forth from the fleet and approached them head-on.
This is the Council's Task Force 7, currently on a patrol mission.
Who are you? Why are you blocking our path?
...Hornet?
I don't understand...
You know me?
Wait a second...
Is that you...
...Enty?

龍宮の秘境.say: 「ヘレナ」との相談を終えたあと、「天の扉」への招待を受ける旨を重桜側に伝えた。
一日かけて準備を整え、重桜に到着して5日目の朝、自分はヘレナと共に秘境へと向かう旅路についた。
指揮官、私たちが向かう場所は……港なの？
旅は最初から驚きの連続だった。
巨大な施設を隠せるような重桜領内の山へ向かうものとばかり思っていたが、まずは港だった。
その後、重桜の艦船たちの案内で本島を離れた。
ヘレナと航路をあれこれ推測していると、窓の外の景色が気付かぬうちに変化していた。
指揮官、私たち…鏡面海域に入ったの？
綺麗……まるで重桜の絵巻にあるような景色だわ
海面に古風な建築が並んでるわね
東西と南北に走る二本の幹線道路に貫かれ、三つのはっきりとした環状区域に分かれている。
それぞれの環状区域もまた一つにまとまっている陸地ではなく、内部を縦横に走る水路によって、大小様々な区域に細分化されていた。
金色の輝きを放つ楼閣がそこかしこに立ち並び、外側が低く、内側が高くなる配置の法則に従っている。
そして、その最も中心には、雲を衝くかのような高塔がそびえ立っていた。
――「竜宮城」。重桜から提供された資料には、そう記されていた。
指揮官、ヘレナ、天の扉へ向かうためには、目の前の城を必ず通る
…が、私の案内はここまでだ
城内へ通じる水門は開いている。後はあの「お三方」が手配された者が、二人を天の扉まで案内してくれるだろう
え？土佐さんは一緒に行かないの？
ああ、私には城内に入る許可が与えられていないのでな
――この城が…竜宮城なんだよな？
――天の扉へ向かうただの通過点なのに、やけに管理が厳重だな
ああ、竜宮城だからだ
元々、城内に入ることはそれほど手間のかかることではなかった……しかしこの城は「ナラク」事件の際に甚大な被害を受けてな
大和さんが緊急修復を行った際、儀式の必要性から、環境改造が施されたのだ
今の竜宮城は事実上、天の扉の延伸部分と見なされており、管理も当然ながらはるかに厳しくなっている
これ以上のことは私もよくわからん。入ってから中の者に尋ねてみるといい
さあ、城内へ
こうして、ヘレナと共に竜宮城の水門を通り抜けた。
水門が閉まったその瞬間、周囲の環境は再びガラリと変わった。
指揮官、私たち……海の中に入ってる！？
見上げると、いつの間にか青い空は薄暗い海水に変わっていた。
無数の海魚が都市から放たれる光に引き寄せられ、障壁の外側で群れをなして泳ぎ回っている。
――最大深度まで潜るにはおよそ1時間半かかると、資料にはあったが……
――……一瞬で着いてしまったな
ふふ、お二人を驚かせていないとよいのですが
改めまして、大山と申します。そして隣にいるのは四万十です。ここからは私たちがご案内させていただきます
また会ったわね。指揮官～
――改めてよろしく。大山、四万十
――天の扉では、新しいものをたくさん目にすることになるだろうと予想はしていたが……
――まさか道中ですら、こんなにも目を奪われるとは思わななかったよ
ふふ……改造前の竜宮城では機械構造だけで浮上と潜行をしていましたから、確かにそれだけの時間がかかっていました
指揮官さまが見た資料の情報が少し古かっただけですよ
今の竜宮城は、大和さんの改造を経て、もはや「現世の物」とは完全には言えなくなりました
なので、浮上や潜行といった些細なことを瞬時に行えるようになっても、何も不思議ではありませんよ？
――興味深い技術だな…もう少し詳しく教えてくれないか？
ええ、もちろんですよ。指揮官さまの次の質問と一緒にお答えしましょう
次にお聞きになることと、おそらく原理が共通していますので♪
――次の質問か……ああ、確かにもう一つ聞きたいことはあるな
――ここが深海だとしたら、「天の扉」はここのどこかに隠されているってことかな？
――この先は潜航艦に乗り換えて向かうのか？それとも竜宮城でそのまま天の扉まで行けるのか？
そんなに面倒なことをする必要はないわ。今の竜宮城には天の扉へとつながってる門があるから、そこをくくれば大丈夫
（まさか、特異点への転送ゲートか……でも城の外からは巨大な施設は見えなかったが……まさか重桜では入口の小型化を実現したとでもいうのか……？）
（いや……違う）
（ミッドガルドの塔だろうと、アヴァロンの門だろうと、王冠、ナラクでも……特異点の入口は固定されていたはずだ）
（重桜のこの人工特異点は……入口が移動可能なのか？！）
――四万十、「門」というのは、人工特異点の入口のことか？
――どうやって入口の小型化と自由な配置を実現したんだ？
えーと……入口は、ただの門ってだけ！
天の扉は現実世界には存在しないから、唯一ある「依り代」がその門なの
なんでその門を竜宮城内に「置ける」のかは……それは完全に大和の意向としか。それ以上はわからないわ
（どうやら本当に知らないようだ……）
今の竜宮城と同じで、海の上にも海の中にもあるように――
天の扉の入口の門は、ここにも彼方にもあります
指揮官さまが水門を通って海の中に入れたのと同じように、門をくぐれば天の扉に入れますよ
――ええと、つまり竜宮城は二つあって、片方が水上にあって、もう一つは水中にあって……転送機能付きの水門で繋がってる、ということ？
いいえ、竜宮城は一つだけですよ。今の竜宮城はもはや現世の物ではなくなっていますから、こういう芸当が可能なのです
（うーーん、この説明もよくわからない……）
（……この話はここまでにしよう。とりあえず後で「ヘレナ」に聞いてみるか）
――ああ……だいたい分かった
――竜宮城が改造される前はどうだったんだ？自分の知る限り、天の扉は竜宮城より前からあったはずだが…
――昔は、どうやって天の扉へ行ってたんだ？
昔は……今より遥かに手間がかかりましたね
今みたいに招待さえあれば門から天の扉に入れるのとは違い、昔は神木の地脈を経由するしかなかったのです
あの頃は、私も中には入れませんでした
むしろ入れたのは四万十みたいに神木を自由に行き来できる者だけでしたね
そもそも、ここの入口は大和さんが「返魂の儀」を円滑に進めるために特別に設置したもので…
儀式が終わった後も、大和さんの決定で取り外さずに残しておくことになりました
おかげで、私たちも天の扉を見る機会を得られましたね
あら、ごめんなさい。長々と話してしまいました
指揮官さま、ヘレナさま、こちらへ
重桜はほかの陣営との交流があまり進んでいなく、謎に包まれているところが多い。
中でも、大和に関わることとなると、不思議なほど謎が多い。
アズールレーン上層部でも、彼女が戦艦であること、名前が大和であること以外に、何の情報も持ち合わせていないようだ。
実際のところ、「ナラク」事件で活躍していたにも関わらず、誰も彼女の姿を見ていなかった。
「艦船たちを儀式で蘇らせた」――簡単そうに言うが、やっている事は凄まじいものだ。
これは、艦船が損傷し戦闘不能になり、引き揚げて修復した後に再び戦闘序列に加わるのとは異なる。
ナラク事件における重桜艦船の多くは深刻な損傷を受け、中には「カラダ」さえ失ったものもいるそうだ。
普通なら例え艦体を修理しても復活する可能性は皆無と思われるが……だが、大和はそれを成し遂げた。
それも艦船自身のリュウコツに格納すべき情報だけで、文字通り「蘇らせた」のだ。
そんな離れ業をどうやって実現したのかはさておき、本来すぐに消滅するはずだった情報を寸分違わず保存できたことだけでも、深く考えさせられる。
特に、「薔薇の塔」が最後に放った眩い輝きを目撃した後では……
大和のやっていることは計り知れない……この先何が待ち受けているのか期待しよう。

sequence: 「アマハラは、天域に因りて定まる」
「たとえ地崩れ山潰え、浩劫来たとて」

天の扉.say: 門を越えると、景色は瞬く間に変わった。
なんと、自分とヘレナは一面の金色の雲海の中を歩いていた。
指揮官？
ヘレナさん
ようこそ天の扉へ～！
雲の中に隠れていたクラッカーが一斉に鳴り、紙吹雪が燐火のように舞い、輝いたと思いきや、跡形もなく消えていた。
わたしは伊404よ。横の二人は妙風と水無瀬。ここからはこの三人で案内するわ
よ、よろしくね……
よろしく。ヘレナ
よろしく～！
伊404一行がもたらした活気と情熱が、道中で張り詰めていた緊張を和らげてくれた。
――案内役がこれで三組目だな。なにかおもてなしリレーでもやってるのかな？
おもてなしリレー？なかなか的を射てるじゃない！
――大山と四万十も天の扉に入れるのに、なぜこんな手筈になってるんだ？
理由は二つあって、あの二人はまだ竜宮城で改修作業を行う必要があるの
もう一つは今、天の扉で特別な儀式が準備されていて、環境の安定が求められるの
だから、出入りする人が少なければ少ないほどいいってこと
なんにせよ、この儀式はあんたのために準備されたものだから、楽しみにしててちょうだい
そうだ。指揮官、ヘレナ
この天の扉を実際に見て、どう思った？
――そうだな……
――来る前にいくつか資料を調べてみたんだが……
――伝承的なものなら、もっと暗くて閉鎖的で重苦しい空間とか…
――原始的な石造りの建築物が多いのかと想像してたよ
――実際は意外と広々として明るい場所なんだな
あははは♪それ、わたしも最初はおんなじように思ってたよ
でもよく考えてみてよ。大和さんが住む場所が暗くて重苦しいわけがないでしょ？
閉鎖的というのは本当だけど、広々としてるかどうかは……それは後のお楽しみということで♪
ヘレナはどう思った？
指揮官がの言う通り、広々として明るい感じね……それに、なんだか安心できる雰囲気があって、自然とリラックスできるような……
そうそう！その「安心できる」って感じは紛れもなく本物よ
天の扉の中にたくさんの法陣が設置されていて、中には明るい感情を用いて精神を安定させる効果のものもあるの
知らず知らずのうちに精神を和らげ、心労を解消し、気分をずっと良くしてくれるわ
（なるほど、今感じた安心感は大和が設置した法陣のおかげなのか）
（ポジティブな感情で精神を安定させる、か……すごい）
はぁ～、天の扉にいると本当に癒されるわ。なんだか帰りたくなくなっちゃう
――伊404はずっとここにいるんじゃないのか？
違うわよ。わたしたちは、竜宮城側の門が修復されてから来たの
――ふむ。つまり「ナラク」事件が終わってから、徐々に仲間たちにも門戸が開かれたのか…？
――伊404たちは何のためにここへ？
ふふん。あのお三方から割り当てられた仕事のために決まってるでしょ～
仕事の内容は、さっきの特別な儀式と同じで、まだ内緒♪
じゃあ指揮官、ヘレナ、ついてきて！

雲に乗って.say: じゃあ指揮官、ヘレナ、ついてきて！
伊404は軽く頷き、手で「どうぞ」と言っているような仕草をして見せた。
すると一陣の微風が吹き、足元の雲が魔法の絨毯のようにゆっくりと前へと進み始めた。
指揮官、私たち……雲に乗って飛んでる！？
――ああ……すごいな
――雲に乗って飛ぶなんて、マルティリウムでの時以来だな……
――あの時も雲を海と見立てて、雲海の上で敵と戦ったよ
雲海の上で戦う……指揮官は私の知らないところで、一人でそんな経験をしてたんだ…？
なのに私、全然指揮官の役に立ててない…
――各々でちゃんと役目があるから気にしないことだ。自分にも、ヘレナにも、メンフィスにも
――少なくとも今回は、一緒に雲の上を歩いているよ
うん……私頑張るわ！
――頑張ってバカンスを楽しむのか？
もう、指揮官……！
乗った雲が徐々に加速していき、周囲の景色は目まぐるしく変化していった。
宙に浮かんだ岩山や小島、鬱蒼とした大木や用途不明の楼閣を通り過ぎていく。
しばらく進むと、退屈に耐えられなくなったのか、伊404が隣の雲へと飛び移ると、その雲もこちらの雲と共に加速し始めた。
その後、水無瀬と妙風も次々と加わり、彼女たちは軽やかに空中を駆け、次々と雲を乗り継いでいった。
その様子を見て、ヘレナにも加わるように促した。
最初は遠慮がちにしていたヘレナだったが、やがて素直に楽しむようになった。
空を駆けてから30分経ち、一行は旅の目的地に到着した。
気づかぬ内に雲が減速しており、建物の群れの中へと深く入り込んでいた。
――さっきのあのスピードなら、普通は建物に突っ込んでそうだが……どうやって入ってきたんだ？
さすがアズールレーンの指揮官、鋭いわね
多くの人はしばらく滞在しても気づかないのに、さすがね
天の扉の中の空間は、一見何も遮るものがないように見えるけど……本当は結界で区切られていて、無数の小さな空間で構成されているの
例えるなら……うーん、立体パズルとか？積み木とかに似てるかも？
そして空間と空間の境目は、はっきりしてるようで曖昧なのよ
はっきりしてるのは、空間同士が明確に分かれていること。互いに独立した小さな夢の世界、みたいな？
曖昧なのは…夢に入ったり出たりするのと同じで、それぞれの空間をまたぐその瞬間が曖昧だからなの
だからどうやって入ってきたのか気づかないし、周囲の建物もぶつかって壊れたりはしない
曖昧なって話で言ったら、わたしたちが今乗ってる雲と、さっき空を駆け抜けた時の雲はもう違う雲なの
うん――ちょうどいい時間ね。さすがわたし、運転上手♪
指揮官、ヘレナ、おもてなしがもうすぐ始まるわ。会場に向かいましょう
――……おもてなし？
……しまった。おもてなしのことを言い忘れてた！？
コホン……大和さん、武蔵さん、信濃さんは例の特別な儀式で忙しいから、雲仙さんがあんたをおもてなしするわ
あんたが雲仙様と親しいことをお三方は知ってるからそう手配したんだと思うわ
――……雲仙って……
重桜の仙哲よ！
重桜の食事はご満足いただけましたか？
ここの通路はだいぶ入り乱れていて…すべての可能性をも乗り越えてたどり着くとは流石ですね
もしやこれこそが「縁」ということでしょうか
雲仙が、彼女たちと同じかどうかを考えていらっしゃるのですか？
あなたはいろんな意味で特別な存在ですから
あなたも雲仙に気づいて…くださったのですか？
人生は無常。時に、須臾でも永遠となることがあります
………いい月ですね
――あの時の……
あはは！こっちよ、指揮官！

雲海のおもてなし.say: 伊404に案内され、楼閣の中を巡った。
その間、別の会場へと向かったヘレナとは別れ、一人で建物の最上階にたどり着いた。
静まり返っていた場所だが、障子越しに人影がいくつか見えた。
そう広くないおもてなしの間には、深い色のテーブルが置かれていた。
こちらの到着に合わせて、食欲をそそる料理が乗せられた皿が次々とテーブルに運ばれた。
窓の外は晴れ渡り、雲海が渦巻いている。
そよ風が桜の枝を撫で、散る間際の花弁を吹き上げた。
気持ちのいい風が中に入り込み、まるで部屋の中に小さな桜吹雪が巻き起こったかのようだった。
そんな桜吹雪の中、席にいる四人の姿を改めて見渡した。
そのうち二人はすでに知っていた。
前に一度だけ顔を合わせたことがあり、その後の「ナラク」事件や「星隠れ事件」事件でも陰ながら尽力していた重桜の仙哲――雲仙。
テーブルの向かいにいる彼女は、こちらに軽く頷いた。
もう一人は時には敵として、時には仲間として戦ったものの、いずれ共に旅することを約束した、かつての重桜の裏の支配者――赤城。
全ての職務から離れ、天の扉にいる彼女だったが、意外と言うべきか当然と言うべきか、この場に参加していた。
彼女は表立って反応を示さなかったが、部屋に入った瞬間から、傍に座るよう有無を言わせぬ強いオーラを放ち始めた。
二人以外にも優雅な笑みを浮かべる黒服の女性と、興味津々な眼差しを向ける白衣装の少女がいた。
この二人は初めて見る顔だ……
月日が経つのは早いものですね。まさかこんな形で再会できるとは思っていませんでした
指揮官さまご無沙汰しております
仙哲、ですか……なんとも懐かしい響きです
あの頃、雲仙は無名の仙哲で、指揮官さまはアカデミーの生徒でしたね
今や、あなたは世に名を馳せる指揮官です
あの日、指揮官さまはこういう未来が来ることを想像していたのですか？
――いや、さすがにそこまでは……
――あの時の将来設計は今とは全然違っていた。多分雲仙もそうだったんじゃないか？
――だが、今だって……悪くはないだろう？
はい……いいと思います
コホン。雲仙さん、指揮官様が来て早々質問攻めするなんて、失礼だと思わなくて
これは申し訳ございません。どうぞお寛ぎを
紹介させてくださいませ。こちらの二人は浅間と白鳳です
お初にお目にかかります。アズールレーンの指揮官様。浅間と申します。どうぞよろしくお願い申し上げます
そう言うと浅間は優雅に会釈をした。
白鳳ですわ。ごきげんよう、指揮官様
続いて白鳳も挨拶してくれた。
…が、その視線はずっと自分と雲仙と赤城の三者を行ったり来たりしており、なにやら考えがあるようだ。
挨拶も済みましたし、そろそろ始めましょう
おもてなしが始まると、ますます天の扉の奇妙さに驚いた。
奏者の姿が見えないまま、耳元に響く優雅な生演奏――
気づかぬうちに現れ、空いたら下がっている料理、注いでも注いでも空にならない酒器――
全てが美しい夢のようだ。
席上にて――
今回、大和さんからのご招待でしたから、本来であれば武蔵さんと信濃さんがおもてなしを用意するはずでした…
ですが、お二人はあいにく儀式のほうで忙しく、雲仙が代役を務めさせていただきました
――儀式のことはさっき道中で伊404から聞いたよ。どうも自分と関係があるんだって？
はい、仰る通りです。
信濃さんと親しいのですからから、「夢」についてはよくご存知だと思いますが…？
――まあね。何度か体験したことがあるよ
では、この「天の扉」は夢の中だと思いますか？
――それは…道中ずっと考えてた
――天の扉に入ってから見た多くの光景は、「夢」のように見えた。
――だが、自分の意識は間違いなくはっきりとしている
――たとえここが夢だとしても、自分から夢の中に入ったのであって、熟睡中に夢の世界に来たわけではない
――だから、夢かどうか…まだ確かなことは言えないよ
「夢であり、夢ではない」
なぜそのような特性を持つのか…それは、ここが物質に支配された現世ではなく、精神に支配された天域だからです
はい。いわゆる天の扉とは、大和さんが築き上げたもう一つの「門」に過ぎません
天の扉から出れば、「天域アマハラ」になります
現在、大和さんたちお三方は皆アマハラの中にいます。お三方が準備している儀式は、天域アマハラを展延するための儀式なのです
天域アマハラは大和様が長年心血を注いでこられたもの。長年行ってきたことを指揮官様にぜひ体験していただきたいとのことでお越しいただきました
それが終わった後、今後のことについてお話ししよう……とおっしゃってました
――……天域……アマハラ！？
もしかして「アマハラ」に惹きつけられたのかしら？
もう行って…こっちに来ないで…
立ち止まらず…アマハラにも入らないで…
ここは楽園なんかじゃない…ただの墓よ…嘘と偽りによって形作られた墓にすぎないわ！
……指揮官さま？大丈夫ですか？
――大丈夫。……少し……ぼーっとしていただけだ
首を振り、ふと感じた得体の知れない寒気を振り払った。
その後、雲仙と多くのことを語り合った。重桜のこと、そして彼女の物語について。
赤城は行儀よくしているものの、その身には常に薄っすら冷気が漂っていた。
白鳳と浅間はほとんど会話に加わらず、ただこちらの様子を観察していた。
赤城に何か尋ねようとするたび、彼女は無言で拒絶を示し、まるで今は聞くべきではないと言いたいかのようだった。
やがて、歓待の席は終わりの時を迎えた。
ヘレナと合流し、雲仙たちと雲に乗って天の扉の境界線へと向かった。

アマハラの景色.say: 雲が再び流れ出した。
今回は伊404たちは周りの雲に飛び移らなかった。そのためか一行の勢いはさっきと比べてゆったりとしていた。
こうして、小さな雲は静かで安定した飛行を続けていた。
そんな中、不意に開けた空間に入った感覚に陥った。
周囲の景色が大きく変わっていないにも関わらず――新しい空間の中に入ったかのようだった。
それを意識した途端、目の前の光景が一変した。
目の前に現れた宮殿群は、規模においても威容においても、これまでのものをはるかに凌駕していた。
囲んでいる山川草木までもが宮殿群と共に雲海の上に浮かんでいた。
もしも天の扉が雲の上の都市群だと例えるのなら、ここは雲の上にある仙境と言えるだろう。
指揮官様、ヘレナさん、ただいま天域アマハラに到着しましたわ
あら？どうやら白鳳が言うまでもなく、お察しですね
ここが「天域アマハラ」……？
夢の中でだって、こんな不思議な景色は見たことないわ……
……あれ？白鳳さんの口ぶりからして…私よりも先にこの宮殿を見たの？
――それを意識しなければ目にすることはできない
――さっき白鳳がそう言ったのは、ヘレナに意識させるためだ
――とはいえ、自分が気づいたのだってヘレナより少し先というだけだよ
なるほど……ここは、さっきまでいた天の扉とは違うみたいね
――ああ。ここの空間は天の扉よりもっと広い……
さすが、とても鋭い洞察力ですわ
天の扉は天域の正面玄関として作られましたが、与えられた扉という名から連想される範囲を大きく外れることはありませんでした
ですが、天域アマハラは違います。広大な天の世界です
私が初めて来た時からここは美しかったですが、今皆さんが目にしているほどではありませんでした
少しずつ発展してきて、やっと天域という名に相応しい景色になりました
天域アマハラの可能性はこれが限界ではありません。一日ごとにもっと広く、もっと華美になっていくのです
つまり文字通りの日進月歩ですわ
――「日進月歩」とは……「ナラク」事件のあとか？
あら、どうしてそうお考えに？
――竜宮城の改造は「ナラク」事件の後だ。そして天の扉は長期間に渡る閉鎖を解除した……
――伊404たちを呼んだのは、ここの空間を広げるためじゃないか？
天域アマハラを広げるなんてまだ無理よ。……わたしたちが主に担当してるのは、パトロールなの
――なら、ここの空間を広げているのは何が……？
当ててみてはいかがですか？
そうですね、範囲が広すぎるのも良くないですから……う～ん、この場にいるみんなに限定しておきましょう
――この場にいるみんな……
――自分とヘレナ、あと伊404はまず除外できるな。残りは雲仙、赤城、浅間、白鳳……
（さっき同席していた面々だな……ってことは……）
（となると赤城が不機嫌になっていることも踏まえると……）
――雲仙、浅間、白鳳の3人か
一人足りてませんわ
――いや、自分的には雲仙、浅間、白鳳の3人で……
ねぇ、指揮官様……赤城の名が出ないのはわざとですか？
――ごめん。ここに来てから赤城はずっと機嫌が良くなさそうに思って、それで…
別に指揮官様のせいじゃないですわ。勝手な想像をしないでください
一度雲の奥の方を眺めたかと思うと、赤城はきっぱりとこの話題を終わらせた。
あら、最初から察していたようですね。うふふ、少し指揮官様を尊敬する気持ちになりましたわ~
……ふん

幻夢石.say: いつの間にか、酒香漂う庭にたどり着いた。
指揮官様、こちらでしばしお待ちを
今日のアマハラ展延任務を遂行するために、白鳳たちにはまだ少しばかり準備が必要です
近江――近江、指揮官様がいらっしゃいましたわ。「幻夢石」はもう用意できましたか？
うぅぅ……もうそんな時間なの？みんな、ちょっと待ってちょうだい
しばらくして、雅な衣装を身に纏いながらも、だらりとした少女が、奇妙な造形の艦装に乗ってそっと現れた。
――……ひょうたんの艤装？
ええ、此方は近江。お会いできて光栄よ
うふふ、もしやこの酒ひょうたんにご興味が？
ではこの「雲海の佳醸」を……一杯いかが？
雲海の佳醸のことは後でいいですわ。それより、幻夢石の調整は？
当然調整を済ませているわ。みんな、どうぞこちらをご覧あれ――
近江がひらひらと袖を振ると、空中に小さな灰色の玉が現れた。
指揮官様、こちらが幻夢石ですわ。天域アマハラを構成する基盤となる石です
天域アマハラと天の扉の違いにお気づきになられたのですから、一度この幻夢石をよく観察されてみてはいかがでしょう。きっと何か気づくはずですわ
幻夢石を観察していると、いつの間にかこの灰色の玉が透明な泡になっていた。
泡の中には雲が漂っていて、雲の中にはもっと小さな山や建物があった。まるで、その中が小さな天域かのようだ。
指揮官様、今見たものが幻夢石の本質ですわ
空間を圧縮、純化し、調整を加えてようやく完成する貴重なものです
使用者の想像力でその潜在能力を呼び起こし、まるで「夢を織る」かのようにその空間を加工できるんです
白鳳たちは、こうして天域アマハラを展延してきましたわ
この新しい建設方法はいつ見ても不思議ですわね
（新しい建設方法？）
（バレないようにシンクロナイズするのに少し時間をかけたから……これなら安定した通信ができるはず）
（指揮官、今どこにいるの？もう落ち着いた？）
（ああ。天の扉から移動して天域アマハラにいるよ）
（大和に誘われて、天域アマハラの仕組みを体験している。終わったあとに大事な話があるそうだ）
（天域アマハラね…その空間のことは知ってるわ。こっちの大和がこっそり色々してたから）
（……この天域アマハラは、この前見た悪夢の中で聞いたアマハラと何か関係あるか？）
（まだその夢のことを覚えてるのね。心配しないで。実験場βの天域アマハラは本質的には大和が構築した精神防護システムなの）
（指揮官が夢で聞いたっていうアマハラとも関係があるにはあるけど、技術体系が全然違うの。今はただ名前が似ているだけって思えばいいわ）
（あと、幻夢石のことは知ってるか？これは重桜の神石と何か関係ある物だったりする？）
（……幻夢石？それは何？）
さっき白鳳から聞いた原理に自分なりの見解を付け加えて「ヘレナ」に伝えた。
（この幻夢石は前に「META」のエリザベスとアルザスが死の概念でマルティリウムを創り出したのと同じ原理に思うんだが、どうだろう？）
（そうね。ただ、こっちの方がもっとハイレベルみたい）
（概念を利用しただけでなく、「天域アマハラ」に属する概念集合まで創り出しているわ）
（……もっとハイレベルだと？大和ってそんなにすごいのか？）
（……ここまでではなかったはずなんだけど）
（この前私が調べた時は、大和はこんな方法を取っていなかったの）
（そういえば、これは新しい建設方法だって、さっき赤城が言ってた）
（天域アマハラの大規模展延は「ナラク」事件以降に実施されたことを考えると、幻夢石もまた「ナラク」事件以降に使われるようになったんだと思う）
（……その幻夢石とやらは、隕石サンプルと関係があるのかもしれない）
（「神通」にもちょっと聞いてみるわ。また後で）
「ヘレナ」は通信を切った。自分もまた白鳳たちと一緒に、天域アマハラを展延する体験の旅を始めることとなった。

雲海の佳醸.say: 荒れる雲海と共に、新しいエリアへやってきた。
何が見えてるの？
――何もない、ただの雲海だな
うふふ、ならもう一度よく見てご覧？
近江が幻夢石を額に当てた。
すると、幻夢石が泡ぶくのように破裂して消えたと同時に、周囲の景色も一変した。
自分は楼閣の中で縁側の外の無限に広がる水面を眺めていた。
今度は何が見えてる？
――近江が幻夢石で創り出した……お城と、海？
――てっきり天域アマハラでは雲海しか創り出せないものだと思ってた
うふふ。見ての通り、雲海だけじゃないわ
道中で雲海しか見えなかったのは、「移動」していたからよ
天域アマハラの中での移動だから、もちろん景色は雲海仙境だけ…
だけど今は、アマハラのいろんな所を探索しているんだから…
せっかくなら、やっぱり新しい景色を見ないと
それに、あれは海じゃなくて湖
色々あって、1個の幻夢石が創り出せる空間の大きさには上限があるの。ちょうど、今目の前に広がった湖がその限界ね
だってここは夢のようなものだから。広ければ広いほど不確定要素が多くなって、作ってからの確認や、定着させるための手間も膨らんでいくの
――夢の世界と似た不安定性……たとえば負の感情による影響を受けるってこととかかな？
それについては大丈夫。負の感情は全部アマハラにあるたくさんの法陣によって抑え込んでるから
悪夢に出てくる化生が暴れ回る心配はしなくていいわ
（よかった……大和は色々考えているようだ）
（この前見た、まるで恐怖が形作られているような光景なんて……もう二度と見たくないからな）
そろそろ「雲海の佳醸」をいただくとしましょう
はい。近江、頼みますわよ
少々お待ちを～すぐに用意してあげる♪
近江が軽くひょうたんを叩くと、中から液体がらせん状に流れ出し、テーブルにある盃を満たした。
天域アマハラの中で環境になじみやすくなるよう、大和さんはこの「雲海の佳醸」を作ってくださいました
この酒を飲んだ者は、正式に天域アマハラの客人として認められ、「アマハラ大陣」から加護を受けるようになりますわ。
それと、雲海の佳醸にも特性があり、飲んだあとしばらくの間は恩恵を受けられます
道を急ぐのも、幻夢石で空間を創り出すのも、全部楽にできるようになりますよ
（……そんなにすごいのか？）
（登録、そしてチューニングをするだけね）
「ヘレナ」の通信から声が再び聞こえてきた。
（技術に対する重桜のパッケージング、そのもう一つの典型例ね）
（天域アマハラの管理者は、飲酒という行為で登録認証を設定したようね）
（だから、この後行うであろう、天域アマハラの編集と改変――空間の展延権限を得るためには、まずアカウントを登録する必要がある）
（そしてアマハラの環境への適応ってのは…一種のチューニングよ）
（要は「お酒」も、さっき言ってた「飲む行為」も同じで、一種の象徴に過ぎないから）
（もし私が管理者なら……うーん、コーラにしようかな）
（この辺の原理は少し複雑だから、説明を省くね。指揮官、ここまで聞いたら色々理解しやすくなったんじゃないの？）
（……噛み砕いて説明してくれてありがとう。おかげで分かった。ところで、そっちの調査は終わったのか？）
（まだよ。指揮官のことが心配になって途中で様子を見に来たの）
（初歩的な調査でわかったことだけど、これは神石に対するある種の高度な使用法みたい）
（技術そのものには一定のリスクがあるけど、加工者の腕によってそのリスクは減らせるわ）
（幻夢石を手に入れても、すぐには使わないでね。先に分析させてほしいわ）
（私、気になってるの。大和はどうやってこんな技術を手に入れたのか……）
指揮官様、まだ何か心配事でも？何なりとお申し付けください。この白鳳が全部答えて差し上げますわ
（あ、そうそう。今の私たちの時間は完全に現実とリンクしてるわ）
（事情を知らない人からしたら、指揮官はずっとボーっとしてるように見えちゃうから）
――コホン……なんでもない。景色を眺めていたら見入ってた……
――それではみんな、乾杯。
迷わず盃に満ちた美酒を飲み干した。
――スッキリした甘さがあり、花と果実の独特な香りも帯びていて……
――スッキリした甘さがあり、花と果実の独特な香りも帯びていて……
一瞬、何やら既視感を覚えた。この酒を飲むのは初めてじゃない、と
（おかしい……ヘレナは、この酒はただの象徴だと言わなかったか？）
（なのになぜだろう……この空間が……さっきよりももっとはっきり見えるような……？）
（あと、さっき突然感じたあの既視感は……？）

夢織り.say: 雲海の佳醸を飲み干したあと、近江、伊404、水無瀬、妙風はそれぞれの持ち場へと戻っていった。
自分はヘレナ、雲仙、赤城、浅間、白鳳と一緒に開けた雲海へやってきた。
どうやら自分の手で空間を展延させる前に、もう少し見せたいものがあるらしい。
それでは、私が手本を見せましょう
浅間が幻夢石を額にピタッと当てた。
すると、幻夢石が泡ぶくのように破裂して消えたと同時に、周囲の景色も一変した。
自分は今荒廃した空間の中にいる。辺りは暗く、どこかしこも朽ち果てている。
幻夢石で夢を織るというのはすなわち、心の中で思っているものを映し出すことです
己が見たい光景をはっきりと思い浮かべず、漠然としたものしか持たないのであれば、このような空間になってしまいます
己の思いがあまりにも消極的だったり、慌て慄くような感情に囚われれば……
アマハラ大陣の抑え込みと濾過作用によって、このような形を成さない混沌とした空間を創り出してしまいます
（なるほど、暴走した感情から恐ろしいものが生まれるのをこうして防いでいるわけか）
このような無秩序な空間に対しては、二通りの対処法があります
一つは、アマハラ各所に設置されている法陣の力を借りて、この空間を徹底的に抹消すること
便利な方法ですが、いささか大仰でしょう
なので、通常はこちらの方法をよく使います。この空間を分解し、別の夢の養分にするのです
話を聞くだけだと、指揮官様もさぞ退屈でしょう
赤城が直接お手本を見せてあげますわ
はい、どうぞ
混沌の中で、赤城が歩き出した。
彼女が一歩踏み出すと、世界もそれに合わせて一変した。
今自分は咲き誇る一面の彼岸花の中を歩いている。夕日が地平線に迫り、空を紅色に染めている。
――これが……赤城の心象風景か？
今こういった風景を思い浮かべているだけに過ぎませんわ
指揮官様、いかがですか？
――地平線の果てまで広がる彼岸花の海。絵のような美しい風景だ
それは良かったです。ちなみに本物も育てていて、今は加賀が手入れをしていますわ
もし宜しければ、また後日……
次は雲仙の方もご覧くださいませ
雲仙は赤城とは別の方向を向いた。
そして息を整え、力を込めて剣を一振りした。
我が心象を……「示し現せ」！
清らかな川、透き通るような青い空、生き生きとした芝生、桜色の水晶群。
現実とも、雲海とも違う夢のような景色。
平常時の大神木は、このような景色なのです
私はあそこで長い長い時間を過ごしました……
指揮官様は本物の大神木に入れませんから、幻夢石のおかげでこうしてお見せすることができました
では、次は白鳳の番ですわ。指揮官様
白鳳が残りわずかな混沌の前へ立つと――
その場でしゃがみ込み、指先で大地に触れた。
白い鳳凰よ……私の代わりに、世を飛び回れ
雲海が沸き立つ中、白い鳳凰が長い尾を引きながら軽やかに空を舞い――
耳元に澄んだ鳳凰の鳴き声さえ聞こえた。
混沌が全て消え去り、代わりに3つの世界が融和する景色となった。
こんな壮観なものが見られるなんて……
美しい……他に言葉が出ないぐらい美しいわ……
――ああ、こんなに不思議なことが目の前で起こるなんてな……
――まるで天地開闢、万物を創造する奇跡だ……
（ふん。ヘレナは仕方ないにしても、あなたが感心してどうなるの？）
（少しばかりいい景観ってだけよ）
（「少し」どころじゃない…感動した）
（「少し」だよ）
（これくらい、「塔」にだってできるわ。しかもこれよりずっと派手にね。今度遊びに来ない？）
（「塔」で「遊ぶ」のか……？それは珍しいな）
（約束してあげる）
（って、周りに気取られないように落ち着いた振る舞いをして。いい？）
（落ち着いた感じか……）
（それじゃあ、またね）

平和？.say: 美しい風景が混ざりあった世界を出たあと、空っぽな雲海へやってきた。
次は自分が体験する番だ。
幻夢石を受け取り、額にそっと当てた。
世界が一瞬で変化した。
温かい日差しの中、自分は船に乗り、凪の海の上をのらりくらりとしている。
（……今一瞬見えたのは……なんだ？）
指揮官は海を創り出したのね！
幻夢石が一度に創り出せる空間には限りがありますから、海というより、海の一角を切り出した景色といったところでしょう
